channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Watching the Reflecting Pool repairs like reality TV: What does that say about us?
item.description: The Reflecting Pool repairs, initially a two-week project, have turned into a drawn-out saga that captivates bloggers and viewers.

item.title: In pursuit of 'Instagram face,' are we losing the imperfections that make us human?
item.description: Plastic surgery is becoming so normalized and subtle that it alters our perception of reality, writes New Yorker staff writer Jia Tolentino.

item.title: A rare transmissible cancer is spreading among catfish in a border lake
item.description: For over a decade, a lake straddling Vermont and Quebec has seen a puzzling cancer outbreak among its catfish.

item.title: Independent autopsy inconclusive on cause of death for 18-year-old Nolan Wells in Mississippi
item.description: An independent autopsy of Nolan Wells found the cause of death undetermined pending further investigation, according to attorney Ben Crump.
